NAME: Mojtaba
homeDescription: With over 10 years of leading teams and delivering high-impact web applications. I specialize in React, Next.js, and Node.js, designing scalable systems, mentoring engineers, and turning complex requirements into reliable, maintainable solutions that drive business growth.
contactDescription: If you'd like to discuss a project, need help with development, or are looking for technical advice, feel free to reach out. I'm currently available for freelance work and open to new development opportunities.
